seed_records.title: Write-through cache with Redis for product catalog
seed_records.content: Using write-through cache for product catalog. Catalog updates < 100/day but reads 50K/min. Rejected cache-aside due to 30-second staleness window causing pricing discrepancies in checkout.

query: How do we keep product prices consistent?
expected_match_titles: Write-through cache with Redis for product catalog
notes: Query uses 'prices consistent' — semantically related to 'pricing discrepancies' and 'cache staleness'

seed_records.title: Shifted from E2E-heavy to contract testing strategy
seed_records.content: Inverting the test pyramid: 70% unit, 20% contract (Pact), 10% E2E. Selenium E2E suite was 45 minutes with 15% flake rate. Trimming to 50 critical-path E2E tests. Target CI time: 12 minutes.

query: Why are our CI builds so slow?
expected_match_titles: Shifted from E2E-heavy to contract testing strategy
notes: Query about CI speed should surface testing strategy change that addressed CI duration

seed_records.title: Deprioritized native mobile app in favor of PWA
seed_records.content: Mobile DAU is 8% of total. PWA with service workers covers 90% of mobile use cases. Native app in maintenance mode, no new features. 3 mobile engineers transitioning to core web team.

query: Do we still have an iOS app?
expected_match_titles: Deprioritized native mobile app in favor of PWA
notes: Query about iOS should surface the PWA decision even though 'iOS' isn't in the record

seed_records.title: Updated engineering hiring bar with system design round
seed_records.content: Adding system design round for all candidates. New loop: coding (LC medium), system design, behavioral, pair programming. Dropped take-home assignment — candidates report 8+ hours and filters out people with families.

query: What's our policy on take-home assignments for candidates?
expected_match_titles: Updated engineering hiring bar with system design round
